messages.content: rewrite this: It was a B-5 parking near mosque entrance are outdoor.
Near the entrance of the mosque outdoors, there was a B-5 parking area.
All signages were clear in directions.
The signages indicating directions were all clear.
The first security guard was near the parking area and the other was near mosque entry area
One security guard was stationed near the parking area, while the other was stationed near the entrance of the mosque.
first was "Oliver"  and second was  "Jayjay"
Oliver was the first security guard stationed near the parking area, while Jayjay was the second security guard stationed near the entrance of the mosque.

I asked about Tahajjud  prayer time from Oliver he relpied at 12 it will be.
 From Jaya i asked about restroom he guided me about restroom.
When I inquired about the Tahajjud prayer time, Oliver informed me that it would be at 12 o'clock. On the other hand, when I asked Jayjay about the restroom, he provided me with directions to it.

All facilities and service was in excellent way and in proper manners.


 Prayer experience was plesant, and atmosphere was very nice, temperature was comfortable, there enough water bottle during prayer for worshippers.

All facilities and services were provided in an excellent manner and with proper care. The prayer experience itself was quite pleasant, with a nice atmosphere and comfortable temperatures. In addition, there were sufficient water bottles provided during the prayer time for the worshippers.

Wonderful experience at the mosque.

I felt so welcomed. Everything was so well organized. There were number of people with red/ green led light guiding for the parking.
It was a wonderful experience at the mosque, and I felt very welcomed. The organization of everything was exceptional, with a large number of people guiding parking with red and green LED lights.

Then when i entered the security gate, the welcoming face of a security guard guided me to head to the female security section. There again i was met with a smile by a lady security officer. When i entered the mosque i could see number of volunteers to guide you for anything you may need. Overall, very well organized and best experience.

After passing through the security gate, I was greeted by a security guard who directed me towards the female security section. There, I was met with warm smile from a female security officer. Inside the mosque, there were several volunteers available to assist with any needs. Overall, the experience was well-organized and enjoyable.
The outdoor open parking space for the worshippers D-1 north. The parking area was clean and enough parking was available when i arrived.
The outdoor parking space for the worshippers was located in the D-1 North section. It was quite clean and had ample space for parking when I arrived.
rewrite this: I was asked to park in the outdoor open parking space that was meant for worshippers do I couldn’t go to Souq al Jami building.
As I was a worshipper, I was directed to park in the outdoor open parking space specifically allocated for this purpose, which meant I couldn't go to the Souq al Jami building.
